anthropic.note: Enforced via daily lockfile /tmp/audit_check_ai_last_run.txt — at most one audit fire per UTC day. Each fire = 1 Opus extended-thinking call (~$2). No Haiku callers in active code; if reintroduced, pair with explicit enforcement and update this cap.

gemini.note: Hard-coded in gemma4_helper.py _GEMINI_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Currently only audit_check + audit_fire_debate use it; cap has plenty of headroom.

ai_consensus.anthropic:
**Audit verdict: report says LOW — I disagree. Concrete blow-up scenarios:**

**(a) Runaway loops:** 24 timers discovered but `projected.sources=[]` — the auditor failed to map any timer to a cost model. If even one timer fires a debate loop (audit_fire_debate) without the lockfile path resolving (e.g., `/tmp` wiped on reboot, container restart), Opus fires every tick = thousands of $2 calls/day.

**(b) Missing caps:** Anthropic cap relies on a `/tmp` lockfile — non-persistent, no atomic write, no per-process mutex. Gemini cap is in-process only; multiple workers each get 100/day.

**(c) 2× rate:** Gemini doubles to 200 silently (cap not shared); Opus 1→2/day = +$2, tolerable.

**(d) Highest stealth burn:** **Gemini via `gemma4_helper`** — high cap, multi-caller, no central accounting, no
ai_consensus.grok:
**Blow-up risks:**

(a) **Runaway-loop**: `audit_fire_debate` + Gemini could self-trigger in a loop if lockfile race or exception bypasses the daily guard, re-firing audits every cycle.

(b) **Missing caps**: 24 discovered timers have zero declared LLM sources. Any future timer adding even cheap Haiku calls lacks enforcement (explicit warning in Anthropic note).

(c) **2x rate**: Anthropic jumps from 1→2 calls/day = $4/day (Opus). Gemini 200 calls/day remains safe under hard cap but erodes headroom fast.

(d) **Silent burner**: **Anthropic** — lockfile `/tmp/audit_check_ai_last_run.txt` can fail silently on multi-instance or FS issues, burning $2 Opus calls with no visible log until bill arrives.

Overall: LOW today, HIGH if timers or Haiku are activated without updating caps.
